BUILD.bazel.content:
"""Versioned app 'coder' for k8s-a -- generated by defn gen."""

load("//kernel:fmt.bzl", "fmt_test")
load("//kernel:tagged.bzl", "tagged_file")
load("//kernel/interface/app:app.bzl", "app_kustomize_versioned")

app_kustomize_versioned(
    name = "app",
    chart_tgz = "coder_helm_2.33.6.tgz",
    k8s_version = "1.36.1",
    parent_source_path = "tenant/library/app/coder",
    parent_workspace_path = "var/app/coder",
    workspace_path = "var/app/coder/k8s-a",
)

fmt_test(
    name = "build_bazel_fmt",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tool = "buildifier",
)

tagged_file(
    name = "build_bazel_tag",
    src = "BUILD.bazel",
    tags = [
        "bazel",
        "bazel-build",
    ],
)

[fmt_test(
    name = "dispatch_cue_fmt",
    src = src,
    tool = "cue",
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

[tagged_file(
    name = "dispatch_cue_tag",
    src = src,
    tags = [
        "cue",
        "source",
    ],
) for src in glob(["dispatch.cue"], allow_empty = True)]

kustomization.yaml.content:
# Generated by defn gen from app.cue + catalog. DO NOT EDIT.
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
helmGlobals:
  chartHome: charts
helmCharts:
  - name: coder
    version: 2.33.6
    releaseName: coder
    namespace: coder
    valuesInline:
      coder:
        service:
          type: ClusterIP
images:
  - name: ghcr.io/coder/coder
    newName: host.k3d.internal:5000/mirror/ghcr.io/coder/coder
    newTag: v2.33.3
patches:
  - target:
      kind: ServiceAccount
      name: coder
    patch: |
      - op: remove
        path: /metadata/namespace
  - target:
      kind: Role
      name: coder-workspace-perms
    patch: |
      - op: remove
        path: /metadata/namespace
  - target:
      kind: RoleBinding
      name: coder
    patch: |
      - op: remove
        path: /metadata/namespace
  - target:
      kind: Service
      name: coder
    patch: |
      - op: remove
        path: /metadata/namespace
  - target:
      kind: Deployment
      name: coder
    patch: |
      - op: remove
        path: /metadata/namespace
